title: pandanus lucidus
intro: Pandanus lucidus, also known as the Chinese screwpine or Chinese pandan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pandanaceae. It has been traditionally used in various forms of medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, Pandanus lucidus is prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil to be used topically, with some recipes also calling for the leaves to be dried and crushed for use in soups and other culinary applications.
